data.title: isinwheel Rolls Out Spring Initiatives Across Britain and Europe
data.description: In Berlin on March 13, 2026, isinwheel, a prominent player in electric mobility solutions, announced the commencement of its Spring Promotion on February 27 to coincide with the start of pre-sales for multiple new products as the spring travel season approaches. The promotion will run until April, offering customers exclusive deals and discounts on cutting-edge electric mobility solutions.

data.title: Senators Van Hollen, Warren, and Gallego to oversee DOJ probe into Binance to ensure a thorough investigation.
data.description: Chris Van Hollen, Elizabeth Warren, and Ruben Gallego, all senators, have pledged to push for a thorough investigation by the Justice Department into Binance.

data.description: In Hyderabad, India on March 13, 2026, a report by Mordor Intelligence states that the organic fertilizers market is expected to grow significantly, with a projected increase from USD 12.02 billion in 2026 to USD 18.65 billion by 2031. data.title: SEMIFIVE Pulls Ahead in AI ASIC Market, Expanding Lead with Successive NPU Project Wins
data.description: SEMIFIVE, a global leader in high-performance ASIC market, has recently won a project worth KRW 18 billion for the development of their next-generation AI NPU. This success emphasizes their strong position in AI semiconductor design, showcasing their competitiveness by securing consecutive contracts for 4nm AI chips. The project marks a significant milestone for SEMIFIVE, underlining their continued dedication to innovation and advancement in the industry.

data.title: Tetragon Financial Group Limited Announcement of Tender Offer to Purchase $50,000,000 of Tetragon Non-Voting Shares
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Tetragon declared the start of a tender offer to buy back some of its non-voting shares for up to $50,000,000 in cash. This offer was first revealed by Tetragon on March 5.

data.title: Michael Saylor Says Bitcoin Doesn't 'Go To The Moon' Overnight — Strategy Chair Says There's Always A 'Delay'
data.description: Strategy Inc.'s Chair, Michael Saylor, mentioned that purchasing Bitcoin (BTC) does not immediately drive up the price, emphasizing a delay between acquisition and a potential surge. This statement serves as a subtle nod to HODLers, who are urged to hold onto their assets despite market conditions. Saylor highlighted the time gap between corporate Bitcoin investments and significant price movements, humorously calling attention to the journey before Bitcoin "goes to the moon." The post received mixed responses, with some referencing Saylor's earlier unconventional stances, while others commended his unwavering stance on the matter. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Arco Vara AS Signs Share Purchase Agreement for Partial Sale of Bulgarian Subsidiary
data.description: Arco Vara AS has recently finalized a deal with Kamaleo Invest OOD, a Bulgarian company, to sell a 25% stake in Botanica Lozen EOOD. The latter is currently overseeing the development of the Botanica Lozen residential project in Sofia.

data.title: HIZENERGY Showcases Innovative C&I Energy Storage Solutions at Solar Solutions Amsterdam 2026
data.description: In the aftermath of Solar Solutions Amsterdam 2026, a significant event held in Amsterdam on March 13, 2026, HIZENERGY, a reputable company specializing in commercial and industrial (C&I) energy storage solutions, showcased their innovative self-developed PCS. This exhibition received notable attention due to the successful participation of HIZENERGY, where they highlighted their latest advancements in the field.
